{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201258438A6BF1F6D3DD7BAB9262"}"},"total":151105},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7206686763933598504","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"追了一年多了，看完之后有一种说不出的失落感。整本书都写的狠好，极力推荐阅读，有喜剧也有泪点。有小部分比较虐，但最后还是一个较圆满的结局，弥补了之前的遗憾。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1677937578,"group_id":"6589909026790706180","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxdQ467tiQbo0xrny4gOu/w=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"109921612030","user_name":"无回岛的林炎"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"109921612030","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6589909026790706180","book_info":{"abstract":"九千年前，仙武帝尊率领百万神将打入太古洪荒，却无一人归来，只有一缕真火遗留世间。
九千年后，门派废徒叶辰，被赶出宗门，无以为家，机缘巧合之下偶得真火，再踏仙武之路。
这是一个神魔仙佛并立的世界，这是一个诸天万域混乱的年代，叶辰的逆天征途，由此开始。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/bfc6f37a245ab1999cc5f6f3d40f1345","author":"六界三道","author_id":"","book_id":"6589909026790706180","book_name":"仙武帝尊","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"18.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":258,"name":"传统玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=258&name=传统玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6603267293617062413","read_count":"182105","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"9417170"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"3365","tags":"传统玄幻,玄幻,诸天万界","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/b72400045f94484c77b2~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779166723&x-signature=PJLurG63aka%2Bv0rNOO6WCjnxz0A%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"488644581014368","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.59608999e+08"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201258438A6BF1F6D3DD7BAB9262"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读44小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":66,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":159608,"reply_count":3,"show_pv":59956},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"6951741948608905252","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本小说写的很有意义，怎么说呢，把诸天万域，比做成一个国家，诸天门比做成边境，天魔入侵，必须成外国侵略，所以我觉得诸天万域每一个人欠大楚（诸天门）一条人命没有毛病，有一些人看不懂可能，所以我说一下，作者在里面一直在提，诸天门一直都欠大楚一条人命是怎么回事？这本小说写的很有哲理，比那些无脑爽要好看的多。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1618578554,"group_id":"6589909026790706180","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"在下新人，请多关照，若有哪里写的不好，请告诉我，我记得改","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5iTk8DJmme/vJfg8WKkNasAivv9vRq6vXqUsVr8L7C0","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/499d451b242447daa28d4cfc9b91f720~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776532276&x-signature=b5vnQ%2BwDJAERE0I56IuDrwysIz0%3D","user_id":"1697283296731166","user_name":"竹风映月"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1697283296731166","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6589909026790706180","book_info":{"abstract":"九千年前，仙武帝尊率领百万神将打入太古洪荒，却无一人归来，只有一缕真火遗留世间。
